# Francisco Moreno — Senior Web UI Engineer

Francisco Moreno is a Senior Web UI Engineer based in The Woodlands, TX with 6+ years
building enterprise web applications for Royal Caribbean, United Airlines, and Dick's Sporting Goods.

Specializes in Angular, React, TypeScript, RxJS, NgRx, Next.js, Node.js, and AWS.

Portfolio: https://frxncismor.dev
Blog: https://frxncismor.dev/blog
Services: https://frxncismor.dev/services
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/frxncismor
GitHub: https://github.com/frxncismor
